data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with the Microsoft Testing Platform enabled. Tests are categorized via `[TestCategory]`. I'll run only the `Integration` tests.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with dotnet test

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests with dotnet test

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` is enabled in Directory.Build.props). The tests are categorized as "Unit" and "Integration". The user wants to run only the Integration tests.

With MSTest and the Microsoft Testing Platform, I can filter by test category using `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

arguments.description: Run integration tests with dotnet test

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-5e82f788c0a44c949effbcb00d4d2275 && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests with dotnet test", "initial_wait": 60}
